title: Queltia × maclayi
intro: Queltia × maclayi, also known as Macleay's Queltia, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities that can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. The bioactive constituents of Queltia × maclayi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenes, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Queltia × maclayi is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to harness its skin-soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
